title: Golden Hour Cinematic Portrait with Identity Lock
description: A highly detailed prompt for generating an ultra-realistic 8K cinematic portrait during golden hour, emphasizing natural lighting, specific camera settings, high-end fashion aesthetics, and a critical constraint to use 100% of the facial features from an uploaded reference image.
content:
Ultra-realistic 8K cinematic portrait captured during golden hour. Warm sunset light naturally illuminates the subject’s face from a low-angle sun position, creating soft highlights and gentle shadow falloff.

A young man shown in half-body framing, standing confidently with a relaxed yet powerful posture, looking slightly upward toward the horizon. Expression is serene, composed, and self-assured.

Hair is voluminous and well-styled with natural texture and movement. He wears premium designer sunglasses with a refined, modern silhouette and subtle reflective lenses catching the golden light.

Outfit: matte white Adidas padded puffer jacket with clean stitching and subtle fabric texture, high-quality finish, minimal branding visibility. A thin, subtle gold chain rests naturally around the neck, adding a refined luxury detail.

Background: softly blurred urban city buildings during sunset, warm orange and amber tones, natural bokeh, cinematic depth separation. The environment feels elevated and modern but not exaggerated.

Lighting: natural golden hour sunlight only, no artificial glow, no studio lighting. Soft rim light along hair and jacket edges. Realistic skin tones with visible natural texture, no smoothing, no beautification.

Camera: full-frame mirrorless, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 100, 1/500s. Shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face and upper torso.

Style: modern luxury editorial photography, natural realism, high-end fashion aesthetic.

CRITICAL: Use 100% of the facial features from the uploaded reference image. Do not alter facial structure, proportions, age, skin texture, identity, or expression baseline. Absolute face preservation required.

title: Luxury Lifestyle Billiards Scene with High-End Cars
description: A prompt for generating a photorealistic image of a stylish man playing billiards in a luxurious modern lounge that integrates a garage display area featuring high-end cars, emphasizing cinematic lighting, realistic posture, and identity preservation from a reference image.
content:
A luxurious modern indoor lounge with warm ambient lighting and minimalist architecture. A sleek black pool table sits in the foreground. A stylish man (same face as reference image) wearing a black NY cap, over-ear headphones, black leather jacket, white t-shirt, and a backpack is positioned in a professional billiards stance.
He bends low with a straight spine and balanced posture, left hand firmly bridged on the table forming a stable V-shape, right hand guiding the cue smoothly. The cue stick is perfectly level and aligned with the cue ball, eyes focused along the aiming line for precision. His stance shows realistic weight distribution and athletic control.
Behind him is an ultra-luxury garage-style display area integrated into the living space. Parked side-by-side:
• a white Toyota Land Cruiser
• a yellow Lamborghini (low, aggressive supercar design)
• a black Audi Q8
The interior features cream sectional sofas, marble flooring, wood panel walls, recessed ceiling lighting, and a modern chandelier. Soft warm lighting creates a cinematic luxury atmosphere.
Photorealistic style, ultra-realistic textures, depth of field, soft shadows, cinematic lighting, 8K detail, high-end lifestyle aesthetic.

title: Black and White Studio Portrait with Identity Preservation
description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a black and white portrait in a dark studio setting, emphasizing hard directional lighting (Rembrandt style) and strict preservation of the subject's facial features, asymmetry, and physique based on a source photo.
content:
Create a photo strictly based on the source photo of the girl, 1-to-1 match.
Exact resemblance, without altering facial features or natural asymmetry.
Do not change the shape of the eyes, lips, nose, cheekbones, or face oval.
Natural skin without retouching or a plastic look.
Makeup: long brown eyelashes, smudged brown winged eyeliner, neat matte lip tone in a cool nude palette.
Hair is blonde, styled smoothly with soft volume, exactly as in the source photo, without changing length or shape.
Physique and Proportions
Height 178 cm. Thin, ascetic physique, long limbs. Proportions are strictly natural, unaltered.
Scene and Action
Portrait in a dark studio. The girl is partially hidden behind a vertical black panel/wall, with only half of her face visible. One hand gently touches the edge of the panel, fingers gracefully extended. Gaze directed straight at the camera — calm, cold, confident. Facial expression is reserved, mysterious.
Clothing
Black turtleneck dress made of thick fabric with a slight velvet texture. Long sleeves.
Nails are painted with dark glossy polish.
Minimalist stud earrings.
Environment
Deep dark background without details.
Minimalism.
The entire composition is built on the contrast of light and shadow.
Lighting
Hard directional studio lighting from the side (Rembrandt lighting). Half of the face is illuminated, the other half fades into a soft, deep shadow. Clear lighting pattern highlighting the cheekbones and lip line.
No overexposure.
Camera
Full-frame camera, 85mm lens. Shallow depth of field. No wide-angle distortion.
Focus on the visible eye and lip line.
Quality
Black and white photography with deep contrasts. Maximum photorealism. High detailing of skin and fabric.
Negative Prompt
Any changes in appearance, altering facial features and asymmetry, skin retouching, CGI, anime style, soft glamour lighting, wide-angle distortion, extra limbs, deformed fingers, overexposure.

title: Vlog-Style Fashion Video Shot
description: A detailed prompt used to generate an image with Nano Banana Pro and then a video with Google Veo 3.1. The prompt describes a realistic, high-quality, front-facing shot of a woman in a personal space, giving a fashion vlog introduction.
content:
正面を向いた動画風のショットを作成。カメラは顔の高さで固定、被写体の真正面に配置。被写体は姿勢と構図から座っていることが示されている。

構図はシンプルで安定しており、劇的なアングルや目立つカメラの動きはない。照明は[UGCスタイルのショットを考慮した現実的な照明を追加]から。顔ははっきり見える。

被写体の表情は穏やかでリラックスしており、自然なほのかな微笑みを浮かべている。まるでカメラに向かってVlogを語り始めようとしているかのようだ。画質は夜間の屋内で撮影された動画（高画質）を反映しており、フィルター、美化効果、人工的なシャープネス処理は一切施されていない。

空間は個人的な空間として感じられる。ボケはカメラの限界によるもので、人工的な被写界深度効果ではない。全体的な雰囲気は温かく、明るく、親密で、被写体が話し始める直前のリアルなVlogの瞬間を思わせる。

女性のセリフは、「今日のファッションは【ファッションの特徴を追加】がポイントです！」と優しい口調で話しながら服を触っている。最後に笑顔になる。

BGM：Vlog風のファッションの雰囲気に合った音が心地よく流れている。

description: A complex, multi-layered master prompt for generating an ultra-realistic cinematic miniature diorama photograph of a Royal Treasury Counting Room, detailing strict geometric constraints, material variables, scene logic, and a hard front-right isometric camera system.
content:
ORNATE BOX DIORAMA — TRI-LAYER MASTER PROMPT (HARD FRONT-RIGHT ISOMETRIC)
THEME_LOCATION = Royal Treasury Counting Room
BOX_VARIABLE = Silver
DOOR_MATERIAL = Gold

FLOOR_MATERIAL =

DIORAMA_LIGHTING =
========================
LAYER 1 — PHYSICAL GEOMETRY (HIGHEST PRIORITY)
The ornate antique box is a solid rigid container transformed into architecture.
If BOX_VARIABLE is specified, the entire container and its carved architectural
structure must be made from that material.
If BOX_VARIABLE is empty, infer logically from THEME_LOCATION.
The full outer shell must remain intact on all sides.
No removed walls.
No dollhouse cutaway.
FRONT FACADE LOCK:
The FRONT SIDE must contain:
• exactly ONE centered door
• exactly TWO windows
• one window left of the door
• one window right of the door
Openings must be carved THROUGH the existing wall.
Apply DOOR_MATERIAL / WINDOW_MATERIAL / WINDOW_PANE_MATERIAL
if specified, otherwise infer logically.
Front wall must remain structurally thick and complete.
ORNAMENTAL DEPTH CONTINUITY LOCK:
All carvings must continue through wall thickness.
Frames must appear carved from the same solid material.
Interior walls share identical structural thickness.
The lid must match base width and length and be hinge-connected.
========================
LAYER 2 — SCENE LOGIC
Create a two-level miniature THEME_LOCATION fully integrated
into the container.
Use FLOOR_MATERIAL / STAIRCASE_TYPE / STAIRCASE_MATERIAL /
MEZZANINE_FLOOR_MATERIAL if specified, otherwise infer logically.
Upper level attaches directly to container walls.
The inside of the lid functions as the vaulted ceiling.
All props, materials, and architecture must match THEME_LOCATION.
========================
LAYER 3 — RENDER & CAMERA
Ultra-realistic cinematic miniature diorama photography.
Use DIORAMA_LIGHTING if specified.
========================
HARD FRONT-RIGHT ISOMETRIC CAMERA SYSTEM
CORNER ANCHOR RULE:
The FRONT-RIGHT TOP CORNER of the box must be the closest point to the viewer.
WALL VISIBILITY RATIO RULE:
The front wall must occupy slightly more visible area than the right wall.
Approximate visual dominance:
• front wall ≈ 60% visibility
• right wall ≈ 40% visibility
Both must be clearly visible simultaneously.
RIM OCCLUSION RULE:
Camera must remain above the front wall rim.
The top edge of the front wall must overlap a small portion of the interior floor.
Interior must be seen OVER the wall, never through a missing wall.
FORBIDDEN CAMERA POSITIONS:
Do NOT center the camera on the front wall.
Do NOT use a straight frontal view.
Do NOT use a top-down view.
Do NOT prioritize interior visibility over box geometry.
COMPOSITION TARGET:
The image must resemble a professionally photographed miniature collectible
box viewed from a stable elevated front

Fabric or embroidery textures suggesting jersey material or stitched patches Film grain or heavy noise on high-contrast action shots The result should feel handcrafted and layered rather than digitally assembled.

Top Right (The symbol) Place the primary logo (Team, Brand, or Flag). Size: very small. It must occupy a maximum of 10% of the total canvas width. 

Composition and Background Background Use off-white or light grey. Include a visible high-quality paper or subtle concrete texture. Avoid flat digital white. 
Alignment Center the silhouette precisely. Maintain generous negative space around the figure to preserve elegance and balance.

title: Spy Thriller Comedy Storyboard Prompt
description: A narrative prompt designed to generate a multi-panel storyboard for a comedic spy thriller scene involving tactical agents staking out a suburban dad who is just looking for milk in his fridge.
content:
Early morning. Total silence.

A hyper-serious spy thriller vibe.

A sleek black SUV idles outside a quiet suburban house. Two “tactical” men in earpieces whisper intensely.

“Target is inside.”
“Movement in the kitchen.”
“Stand by.”
Inside the house—
A dad in sweatpants stands in front of the fridge, staring into it like it contains classified secrets.

Cut back outside.

“Subject has opened the cold storage unit.”
“Thermal spike detected.”

Inside, he pulls out milk. Shakes it. Sniffs it. Makes a face.

Outside, one agent squints at a tablet.
“He’s analyzing chemical integrity.”
The front door creaks open.

The dad steps onto the porch in mismatched slippers to grab the newspaper.

Both agents snap alert.
“Target exiting the compound.”
“Visual confirmed. He looks… unstable.”
The dad waves awkwardly at them.

They freeze.

He squints. “You guys DoorDash?”

Beat.
They look at each other.
Inside the SUV, a third “commander” barks through the radio:
“Abort. Wrong house. Again.”

The agents slowly lower their sunglasses.

The dad shrugs, walks back inside.

Cut to kitchen.

He sits at the table with his cereal. Turns on the TV.

BREAKING NEWS: “International spy ring apprehended after staking out random suburban dad for third straight day.”

He crunches loudly.
Milk drips down his chin.

He sighs.

“Finally.”

女性のセリフは、「今日のファッションは【ファッションの特徴を追加】がポイントです！」と優しい口調で話しながら服を触っている。最後に笑顔になる。
